title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy no wifi [New]
scenario: Privacy Policy screen shows "Something is wrong" error when WiFi is off and navigating from Main Menu > General
steps: 1. Turn off WiFi on the Android device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Main Menu (hamburger icon) in the top-left corner.
expected: The Privacy Policy content loads and displays correctly within the app.
